title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
intro_title: A Space Where You Don't Have to Carry It All.
intro_text:
Finding the right therapist is a lot like finding a home. It has to feel right. Because the connection between us is the single most important factor in "successful" therapy, I offer a complimentary 15-minute consultation call for all new clients.

This is a low-pressure space for us to discuss what’s bringing you to therapy, explore how I can help, discuss possible modalities like EMDR or IFS-informed parts work, and ensure we are a good fit before we begin the deep work together.

options.label: Free Parking
options.text: The Liberty Street parking lot at 204 Liberty St, SW typically has the best availability.

options.label: Alternative
options.text: The Town Hall garage at 10 Loudoun St, SW is a reliable paid option that generally allows the first two hours for free. Please read any signage for specifics.

options.label: Street Parking
options.text: Metered spots are available on Wirt St SW as well as the intersection of Liberty St and Royal St SW next to the Birkby House.

arrival.title: Arriving for Your In-Person Session
arrival.text:
The office is located at **19 Wirt St SW** in the heart of Leesburg. You'll see a round sign marked 19 Wirt on the building, the same building as Shake & Bops Cafe.

To reach the entrance:
Facing the front of the building, look to the left. You will see two small stone steps leading to a narrow brick walkway.
Follow the path: Walk down the brick path along the side of the building.
The Entrance: When you reach the bank of mailboxes, turn right. You'll see a white door with a welcome mat.

Once inside:
Head upstairs: Take the stairs immediately to your left. Straight through will take you to the cafe.

Make yourself at home: The waiting area is at the top of the stairs. Please feel free to use the restroom or help yourself to a cold drink from the fridge. I'll come out to greet you at our scheduled time.
